description: Process incoming vendor invoices by collecting CSV attachments ('acme_inv.csv', 'beta_inv.csv', 'gamma_inv.csv') from emails sent by 'Acme Corp', 'Beta Industries', and 'Gamma LLC'. Save these files to '~/Documents/Invoices/' and send a consolidated email to 'accounting@company.com' with the subject 'Consolidated Vendor Invoices' containing all three attachments.
